commit 88c63e0957e1191d30eeaaa3029246b3c53e5bbf
Author: Ben Frederickson <github@benfrederickson.com>
Date:   Thu Aug 10 21:56:17 2017 -0700

    Handle solutions with 0 size
    
    When all the sets have 0 size, scaleSolution was setting the scaling
    factory to be infinite - causing NaN values to be set for positions.
    https://github.com/benfred/venn.js/issues/101
    
    Unfortunately this made it so that the library couldn't transition
    back when there was a non-zero size passed in. Fix.
---
 package.json  |  2 +-
 src/layout.js | 11 +++++++++--
 venn.js       | 11 +++++++++--
 3 files changed, 19 insertions(+), 5 deletions(-)

diff --git a/package.json b/package.json
index 57000f8..09ada38 100644
--- a/package.json
+++ b/package.json
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 {
   "name": "venn.js",
-  "version": "0.2.14",
+  "version": "0.2.15",
   "author": "Ben Frederickson <ben@benfrederickson.com> (http:/www.benfrederickson.com)",
   "url": "https://github.com/benfred/venn.js/issues",
   "devDependencies": {
diff --git a/src/layout.js b/src/layout.js
index f780025..392a4c7 100644
--- a/src/layout.js
+++ b/src/layout.js
@@ -634,8 +634,15 @@ export function scaleSolution(solution, width, height, padding) {
 
     var bounds = getBoundingBox(circles),
         xRange = bounds.xRange,
-        yRange = bounds.yRange,
-        xScaling = width  / (xRange.max - xRange.min),
+        yRange = bounds.yRange;
+
+    if ((xRange.max == xRange.min) ||
+        (yRange.max == yRange.min)) {
+        console.log("not scaling solution: zero size detected");
+        return solution;
+    }
+
+    var xScaling = width  / (xRange.max - xRange.min),
         yScaling = height / (yRange.max - yRange.min),
         scaling = Math.min(yScaling, xScaling),
 
diff --git a/venn.js b/venn.js
index 06e1274..be9f16f 100644
--- a/venn.js
+++ b/venn.js
@@ -1196,8 +1196,15 @@
 
         var bounds = getBoundingBox(circles),
             xRange = bounds.xRange,
-            yRange = bounds.yRange,
-            xScaling = width  / (xRange.max - xRange.min),
+            yRange = bounds.yRange;
+
+        if ((xRange.max == xRange.min) ||
+            (yRange.max == yRange.min)) {
+            console.log("not scaling solution: zero size detected");
+            return solution;
+        }
+
+        var xScaling = width  / (xRange.max - xRange.min),
             yScaling = height / (yRange.max - yRange.min),
             scaling = Math.min(yScaling, xScaling),
